endpoints.name: GET /doubleclicksearch/v2/agency/{agencyId}/advertiser/{advertiserId}/engine/{engineAccountId}/conversion
endpoints.description: Retrieves a list of conversions from a DoubleClick Search engine account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{AGENCYID}} with a real agencyid. Replace {{ENGINEACCOUNTID}} with a real engineaccountid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: GET /doubleclicksearch/v2/agency/{agencyId}/advertiser/{advertiserId}/idmapping
endpoints.description: Downloads a csv file(encoded in UTF-8) that contains ID mappings between legacy SA360 and new SA360. The file includes all children entities of the given advertiser(e.g. engine accounts, campaigns, ad groups, etc.) that exist in both legacy SA360 and new SA360.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{AGENCYID}} with a real agencyid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: GET /doubleclicksearch/v2/agency/{agencyId}/advertiser/{advertiserId}/savedcolumns
endpoints.description: Retrieve the list of saved columns for a specified advertiser.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{AGENCYID}} with a real agencyid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: POST /doubleclicksearch/v2/conversion
endpoints.description: Inserts a batch of new conversions into DoubleClick Search.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: PUT /doubleclicksearch/v2/conversion
endpoints.description: Updates a batch of conversions in DoubleClick Search.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /doubleclicksearch/v2/conversion/updateAvailability
endpoints.description: Updates the availabilities of a batch of floodlight activities in DoubleClick Search.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /doubleclicksearch/v2/customer/{customerId}/conversion
endpoints.description: Retrieves a list of conversions from a DoubleClick Search engine account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CUSTOMERID}} with a real customerid.

endpoints.name: POST /doubleclicksearch/v2/reports
endpoints.description: Inserts a report request into the reporting system.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /doubleclicksearch/v2/reports/generate
endpoints.description: Generates and returns a report immediately.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /doubleclicksearch/v2/reports/{reportId}
endpoints.description: Polls for the status of a report request.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{REPORTID}} with a real reportid.

endpoints.name: GET /doubleclicksearch/v2/reports/{reportId}/files/{reportFragment}
endpoints.description: Downloads a report file encoded in UTF-8.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{REPORTFRAGMENT}} with a real reportfragment. Replace {{REPORTID}} with a real reportid.
